PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE ORDER RE: SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 6/26/02 TO ANTHONY L. HEAD, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT ON $250.00 IS SCHEDULED TODAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS.
